wpPortfolio.title: Multi-Provider Insurance Aggregator Portal
wpPortfolio.content: emQube built an integrated online portal allowing insurance brokers to manage, compare, and issue policies from multiple insurance providers for their customers.

softwarePortfolioLayout.aboutApplication:
The front-end web application serves as an insurance aggregator, allowing customers to input specific coverage requirements, such as vehicle details or travel plans, to receive instant, comparative estimates. A robust back-office admin module captures these enquiries and manages the end-to-end processing of policy issuance.


The system processes payments through secure, integrated links and streamlines the administrative journey from initial enquiry to final policy generation. It outputs accurate premium calculations and provides the broker with a centralized workflow to manage client policies and insurer relationships efficiently.
softwarePortfolioLayout.clientName: A leading insurance broker in the UAE offering a full suite of car, travel, life, and general insurance policies.
softwarePortfolioLayout.testimonialContent: Building our portal with emQube has allowed us to scale our insurance brokerage significantly. The automation of our policy issuance and enquiry management has streamlined our entire back-office workflow.
